rules.rule_text:
rule BlackNix
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/BlackNix"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$a1 = "SETTINGS" wide
		$a2 = "Mark Adler"
		$a3 = "Random-Number-Here"
		$a4 = "RemoteShell"
		$a5 = "SystemInfo"

	condition:
		all of them
}
